<p class="has-text-align-center" style="font-size:20px">川口の営業さんの雰囲気は？<br>印刷営業士って？<br>なぜ営業の仕事に就いたの？？<br>もっとみなさんに知って欲しい<br>「印刷営業」という仕事を<br>クロストーク形式で<br>お伝えしていきます。</p>

<div style="height:100px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-right epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1396 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/聞き手_こじまさん.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/聞き手_こじまさん.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1396" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">聞き手</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">それでは思い切って、仕事の中で遭遇した事件を聞いていきます。Bさんは外注先で2泊3日という仕事があったと聞きました。</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent transparent transparent #f8f8f8"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent transparent transparent #f8f8f8"></span></div></div></div>



<div style="height:40px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-left epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1402 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Bさん.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Bさん.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1402" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">Bさん</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">うん。カタログの印刷に立ち会わなきゃいけなかったんだけど、ページ数も部数も多くて１日じゃ終わらないんだよね。だから泊まりがけで立ち会いに行ったんだけど、印刷はずっと続くからホテルで寝てる暇がなくて、その会社の応接室のソファーで寝て、３、４時間おきに「起きてください。次の色を見てください」って声かけられて、「OKっす」って確認して、の繰り返しを2泊3日（笑）。お客さんとデザイナーと俺と３人で、よくやったよね。</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span></div></div></div>



<div style="height:40px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-left epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1401 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Cさん.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Cさん.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1401" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">Cさん</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">あとから刷り直しになったら嫌だもんね。2泊3日って、いまでは考えられないね。</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span></div></div></div>



<div style="height:40px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-right epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1396 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/聞き手_こじまさん.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/聞き手_こじまさん.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1396" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">聞き手</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">まるで合宿ですね。</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent transparent transparent #f8f8f8"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent transparent transparent #f8f8f8"></span></div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-left epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1402 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Bさん.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Bさん.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1402" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">Bさん</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">そうそう。大変だったけど、今思えばいい経験だったかな。</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span></div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-right epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1396 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/聞き手_こじまさん.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/聞き手_こじまさん.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1396" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">聞き手</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">Aさんはどうですか？</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent transparent transparent #f8f8f8"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent transparent transparent #f8f8f8"></span></div></div></div>



<div style="height:40px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-left epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1392 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Aさん-1.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Aさん-1.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1392" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">Aさん</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">自分は文章に弱くて、本を読むのもちょっと苦手でね。自分を振り返ると、営業も苦手で、文字も苦手で、この仕事に向いてないと思うんだけど、負けず嫌い。勝負事になると負けたくないっていう気持ちがあって。例えば、記念誌のコンペがあって、臨むんだったら絶対勝つ。それを繰り返していたら、記念誌の数が多くなってたね。</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span></div></div></div>



<div style="height:20px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<p class="has-text-align-center"> <strong>※コンペ</strong>…コンペティションの略。委託業者を決めるための企画競争 </p>



<div style="height:40px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-right epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1396 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/聞き手_こじまさん.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/聞き手_こじまさん.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1396" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">聞き手</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">今まで何冊の記念誌を担当したんですか？</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent transparent transparent #f8f8f8"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent transparent transparent #f8f8f8"></span></div></div></div>



<div style="height:40px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>

<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-left epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1401 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Cさん.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Cさん.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1401" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">Cさん</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">すごいよね。私１冊くらいしかやったことない。</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span></div></div></div>



<div style="height:40px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-left epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1402 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Bさん.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Bさん.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1402" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">Bさん</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">俺も２冊くらい。</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span></div></div></div>



<div style="height:40px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-left epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1392 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Aさん-1.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Aさん-1.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1392" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">Aさん</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">あと、ある広報で１年間執筆したこともあった。子育てのコーナーの連載。本来執筆を予定してた人ができなくなって、当時その広報の担当営業だったんだけど、お客さんから「Aさん、子どもいますよね？」「います」「文章書いてこのコーナー受け持ってください」「いや～、文章嫌いだし…」ってやり取りがあって。断り切れなくて引き受けたんだけど、実はその文章全部ゴーストライターみたいに広報の人が書き直してくれてた。ネタだけ提供して、すごくいい表現で書き直してくれて。</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span></div></div></div>



<div style="height:40px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-right epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1396 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/聞き手_こじまさん.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/聞き手_こじまさん.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1396" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">聞き手</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">どのくらいの期間、執筆したんですか？</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent transparent transparent #f8f8f8"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent transparent transparent #f8f8f8"></span></div></div></div>

<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-left epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1392 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Aさん-1.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Aさん-1.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1392" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">Aさん</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">１年間、６回やった。</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span></div></div></div>



<div style="height:40px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-balloon epb-balloon epb-img-left epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-balloon__icon is-style-epb-circle"><figure><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAH0AAAB9AQAAAACn+1GIAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAAZSURBVEjHY2AYBaNgFIyCUTAKRsEooAAAAAhNAAHOqVEyAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1395 lazyload" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Dさん-1.png" data-eio-rwidth="125" data-eio-rheight="125" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" loading="lazy" src="https://kpj.co.jp/recruit/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Dさん-1.png" class="epb-balloon__img wp-image-1395" style="border-color:#e5e7e8" data-eio="l" /></noscript></figure><figcaption class="epb-balloon__name" style="color:#484848">Dさん</figcaption></div><div class="epb-balloon__content epb-balloon__speech"><div class="epb-balloon__text is-style-epb-radius__32" style="border-width:0px;border-color:#f8f8f8;background-color:#f8f8f8"><p style="color:#333333">その広報は今、私が担当していますが、先方では、歴代の担当営業の中でAさんが印象に残っているって方が多いんですよ。</p><span class="epb-balloon__before" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span><span class="epb-balloon__after" style="border-color:transparent #f8f8f8 transparent transparent"></span></div></div></div>

<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-icon epb-icon epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-icon__inner epb-icon-alignment-left is-style-epb-icon epb-icon-headline__right"><div class="epb-icon__wrapper epb-icon__16" style="border-width:3px;padding:3px;border-color:initial;background-color:#127a54"><i class="epb-icon__font icon-checkmark" style="color:#ffffff"></i></div><div class="epb-icon__headline is-style-none" style="margin-left:8px;font-size:14px">時には合宿のような印刷立ち会いがあることも…！？</div></div></div>



<div style="height:20px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-icon epb-icon epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-icon__inner epb-icon-alignment-left is-style-epb-icon epb-icon-headline__right"><div class="epb-icon__wrapper epb-icon__16" style="border-width:3px;padding:3px;border-color:initial;background-color:#127a54"><i class="epb-icon__font icon-checkmark" style="color:#ffffff"></i></div><div class="epb-icon__headline is-style-none" style="margin-left:8px;font-size:14px">文章が苦手でもスタッフと協力すれば記念誌（書籍）が作れる！</div></div></div>

<div class="wp-block-emanon-premium-blocks-icon epb-icon epb-margin-top__default epb-margin-top__default-sp epb-margin-top__default-tablet"><div class="epb-icon__inner epb-icon-alignment-left is-style-epb-icon epb-icon-headline__right"><div class="epb-icon__wrapper epb-icon__16" style="border-width:3px;padding:3px;border-color:initial;background-color:#127a54"><i class="epb-icon__font icon-checkmark" style="color:#ffffff"></i></div><div class="epb-icon__headline is-style-none" style="margin-left:8px;font-size:14px">営業でもライター体験ができることもある！</div></div></div>



<p class="has-text-align-left has-light-black-color has-text-color" style="font-size:14px">　　（書道の経験を活かして日本酒のラベルを書いた先輩もいるよ！）</p>



<div style="height:20px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>
